description_long: This is a compact, rectangular black toolbox with a hinged lid that opens to reveal a neatly organized interior. The exterior surface of the lid is textured and glossy, giving it a rugged and durable appearance. Inside, the toolbox contains two cylindrical objects, likely tools or tool components, held in place by fitted slots or dividers. The interior is designed for efficient storage, with a single main compartment and no visible trays or drawers. The box appears to be made primarily of a hard, shiny plastic, with metallic or composite accents on the tools inside. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible handles, latches, or external branding.
description: A small, glossy black toolbox with a textured lid and a single main compartment holding two cylindrical tools. The design is minimal and organized, with no visible handles or branding.
description_view_0: Angled view showing the open lid, revealing two cylindrical tools inside the main compartment.
description_view_1: Front view with the lid fully open, clearly displaying the interior layout and the two tools held in place.
description_view_2: Opposite angled view of the open toolbox, again showing the tools and the interior compartment.
description_view_3: Top-down view of the closed toolbox, highlighting the textured, glossy lid with no visible handles or markings.
attribute_handle_type: No visible handle present on the exterior of the toolbox.
attribute_latch_mechanism: No visible latch or locking mechanism present on the toolbox.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Single main compartment with fitted slots or dividers for two cylindrical tools; no trays, drawers, or removable bins visible.
